message:
fix: detect dead crew agents on startup and restart them (gt-31uli)

Replace IsAgentRunning with IsAgentAlive in startOrRestartCrewMember for
more robust zombie detection (checks descendant processes, not just pane
command). Delegate zombie cleanup to crewMgr.Start() which kills the
stale session and recreates it with fresh env vars and runtime settings,
instead of sending commands to a potentially stale session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
